feature_pool_contract.core_prior_role: Higher prior and direct challenger seed eligible.
feature_pool_contract.evidence_watch_role: May enter pymoo combinations with lower prior, but cannot directly seed challenger status.
feature_pool_contract.drop_research_candidate_role: Excluded from selector, ML, PLE and alpha mining candidate paths.
feature_pool_contract.audit_lineage: 179 remains lineage only; monthly mining must not use dropped features.

adaptive_controller.rule: Increase exploration when accepted candidates or novelty are low; decrease exploration when PBO failure, holdout decay, or runtime pressure is high.

schedule.recommended_window: first Saturday 10:00 Asia/Taipei after feature materialization audit and before monthly Optuna/retrain
schedule.promotion_decision: Compare mined candidates against current production strategies using walk-forward, PBO, deflated Sharpe, L1.5 diversity, L2/L3 retention and L4 BUY stability before writing promotion ledger.
